item.title: What they look like
item.content:encoded: Honestly, the thing that is bugging me with this SCP is that I don't exactly know what they look like. Like you said they are "multi-colored humanoid entities with inconsistent body proportions." Like what are the colors of each of the humanoids, or are they each a mix of colors? Also, what are the details of their body structure? I can make assumptions from the images provided, but I would prefer more details on the figures. Other than that, I really like how you wrote this Keter SCP and made many references to natural disasters. The main reason I read your entry was because of the name alone, and I wasn't disappointed. I gave it a 1+ vote.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Former SCP-2512-1 loved the concert these guys did in Taal during their psychadelic phase.

item.title: NO LOVE
item.content:encoded: Just by the title this is a +1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
I don't get any of the references, and I feel like the article could be longer, but I really like the concept.

Tentative upvote.

item.title: Ur a cutey
item.content:encoded: I really like the concept, and the dialogue is great +1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: God is snap and he’ll take you to the chalk zone. +1

item.title: Wasss up duuuudeee
item.content:encoded: Ok admit it we all gave Simon a surfer dude voice in our heads

item.title: I AM THE BEAST I WORSHIP
item.content:encoded: I was listening to NLDW when i saw that title, which made it 1000% better.

item.title: Death Grips SCP?
item.content:encoded: I literally jumped out of my seat when I saw the name of this SCP and read it multiple times to see all the references. And I gotta say not only is this a quality reference its also a quality SCP. Great job!

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Dr. Merzbow: Do you feel remorse for the homes and environment your "gigs" cause?

Unless the band is causing homes to pop into existence, this should probably be rephrased. Probably by changing "cause" to "destroy".

Other than that, I think I like it. It's weird and different. The interview log is obviously what sells this article, and it's very good.

item.title: what makes me a good demoman
item.content:encoded:
id rather be a matchstick than a lighter
i like to see the wood curl up and burn

-cough syrup by butthole surfers


thanks jackal ellie and gecko for looking over my draft
thankser to ratking who drew the poster at the end and nico/tanhony who helped me with the entire thing writing wise love you dawgs
thanks winter and swords and like some other dudes for saying they liked the idea and stuff i was like woah shit epic thanks bros
